ProductConstraintModel.description: Constraint model for the Unlimited 5G Core Data Plan. Enforces: Data Plan cannot be sold without a Router on the same quote (mutual dependency). Minimum quantity of 1 per site. Cannot co-exist with a legacy SBQQ product line — rejected at CML validation. See ADR-006.

constraint.description: Data Plan requires at least one Edge Router on the same quote.
Minimum 1 Data Plan unit required per site.
constraint.masterLabel: Data Plan Min Quantity Per Site
